introSection: TL*3 Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Adventurers Family Entertainment Center in Brooklyn, New York, USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This coaster uses the Wacky Worm layout.

fullText:
TL*3 Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Adventurers Family Entertainment Center in Brooklyn, New York, USA.

This coaster uses the Wacky Worm layout.
